# Five Dimensions

Delhi NCR's premium investment-grade real estate advisory and bespoke wealth architecture firm. Five Dimensions guides high-net-worth individuals (HNWIs) and institutional investors through the entire lifecycle of real estate investment — from data-driven discovery and rigorous due diligence to tax-efficient structuring and ongoing portfolio management.

## Key Details
- **Domain**: https://fivedimensions.in
- **Type**: Advisory Service / Bespoke Consultancy (with digital search & filtering platform)
- **Core Offering**: Premium real estate advisory & wealth management desk.
- **Investment Focus**: Premium commercial offices, luxury residential apartments, luxury land acquisitions, and corporate lease-backs.
- **Differentiators**: 47-Point Due Diligence checklist (title search, litigation records, developer financial health, RERA compliance), Bespoke Wealth Architecture, Dedicated Relationship Managers.
- **Investment Minimum**: ₹50 Lakhs (Residential/Plots) | ₹1 Crore (Commercial/Luxury).

## Key Pages
- [Home Page](https://fivedimensions.in/): Overview of services, founders, 47-point checklist, and builder partners.
- [Opportunities Catalogue](https://fivedimensions.in/opportunities): Handpicked, investment-grade properties in Noida, Greater Noida, and Gurgaon.
- [Insights & Intelligence](https://fivedimensions.in/insights): Real estate market intelligence, legal due diligence guidance, and investment trends.
- [Pricing & Fee Structure](https://fivedimensions.in/pricing.md): Transparent fee structure and investment minimums.

## Verified Builder Partners
We maintain direct integration with tier-1 developer partners:
- DLF
- Godrej Properties
- L&T Realty
- Prestige Group
- Sobha
- Bhutani Infra
